meaning: n.冲沟,溪谷,集水沟,雨水口,檐槽vt.在...上开沟(或槽),水流冲成(沟渠)
examples: He saw Becky and they had an exhausting good time playing hispy and gully-keeper with a crowd of their schoolmates.
In summer the stream from the gully flows into the Baikal.
In summer, the stream from the gully flows into the Baikal.
Giles, though, struck the final blow when Masters was caught by Nick Knight at gully.
With the bat, he was often hard to dislodge and enjoyed flaying the ball over gully.
